extraction.one_line_summary: VAN AERT Wout won the 26km ITT by 31 seconds over VAN GARDEREN Tejay, taking TEUNS Dylan's yellow jersey by exactly 4 seconds to give it to YATES Adam.
tactical_patterns: VAN AERT Wout gained 18 seconds on DUMOULIN Tom at intermediate split, indicating superior descending ability converted TT dominance.
TEUNS Dylan lost yellow jersey by exactly 4 seconds, revealing pre-race GC buffer was calculated too tightly for ITT defense.
YATES Adam's sixth-place TT finish 56 seconds down proves climbers with basic ITT competence inherit leadership when specialists neutralize each other.
VAN GARDEREN Tejay's second place, 31 seconds behind VAN AERT, shows American TT specialists remain undervalued when cyclocross-trained riders enter.

rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: First WorldTour victory via ITT dominance, 46.9 seconds faster than DUMOULIN Tom, elite descending separated him at intermediate split
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: Inherited yellow jersey without winning stage, ITT limiting only 56 seconds suggests viable GC threat on climber-friendly parcours
rider_signals.TEUNS Dylan: negative: Lost yellow by 4 seconds after pre-race confidence about ITT ability, miscalculated margin reveals tactical overconfidence
rider_signals.VAN GARDEREN Tejay: positive: Second place 31 seconds down, described as 'looking rock-solid', significantly outperformed GC position expectations
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: negative: Lost 46.9 seconds to VAN AERT despite former world champion status, descent weakness exposed by 18-second intermediate split deficit
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: neutral: One minute six seconds down suggests mountain bike descending ability didn't translate to TT advantage as commentary predicted
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: negative: Lost 1:20 at finish, 30 seconds to BUCHMANN Emanuel and 33 to DUMOULIN Tom, confirming chronic ITT weakness
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: Crashed during course recon hitting wall in crosswind with one hand on bars, ruled out of Tour de France
rider_signals.KRUIJSWIJK Steven: positive: Fourth place with CRAS Steff showing Jumbo-Visma depth, two riders in top four demonstrates team TT strength
rider_signals.BUCHMANN Emanuel: positive: Beat PINOT Thibaut by 30 seconds, emerging as climber with superior ITT capability for GC defense
